flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Clark College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.7k vs 6.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clark College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9k → 4.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clark College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clark College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $11.2k).
